Headline: #30 South Chicago Temporary Reroute at South Chicago/75th
ShortDescription: 30 South Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted via South Chicago, 76th, Greenwood and South Chicago: due to, street blockage near South Chicago/75th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#30 South Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted via South Chicago, 76th, Greenwood and South Chicago: due to, street blockage near South Chicago/75th.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: No trains between Belmont and Kimball
ShortDescription: Brown Line service has been temporarily suspended between Belmont and Kimball due to a medical emergency on the track at Addison.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Brown Line service has been temporarily suspended between Belmont and Kimball due to a medical emergency on the track at Addison.

As a result, trains are operating only between Clark/Lake and Belmont at this time.

 Shuttle buses  have been requested from Belmont to Kimball to provide connecting service through the affected area. 

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:

# 8 Halsted

#81 W West Lawrence

See station personnel for further assistance, and pay attention to announcements on trains and at stations for service information.

We are working to restore service as quickly as possible. Allow extra travel time.
